The text mentions that 20,000 to 30,000 people are treated for dog bites annually, but that's not the main request from the police here. (C) Take care not to lose their dogs. There's no mention of the police asking people to be careful with their dogs. (D) Give their dogs good training. The police are the ones who will be training the dogs, not the owners.
